command:
echo '' | base64 -d > /tmp/task_record.json
echo '=== WRITE TIER-3 TASK RECORD TO SHARED ECOSYSTEM ==='
KEY='/home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge'
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "mkdir -p /home/jose/moreno-tasks/intake && cat > /home/jose/moreno-tasks/intake/task-repo-cleanup-20260625.json" < /tmp/task_record.json 2>&1
echo 'Task record written'

echo '=== BACKUP CURRENT .gitignore ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "cp /home/jose/moreno-ai/.gitignore /home/jose/moreno-ai/.gitignore.pre-cleanup-backup 2>/dev/null; echo backed_up" 2>&1

echo DONE_1929
